scripts.docs: cargo doc --no-deps && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const t=path.join('target','doc');const d='docs';if(fs.existsSync(d))fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(t,d,{recursive:true});fs.rmSync(t,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('✅ Rust docs moved to ./rust/docs')"
